title: fix: align gen docs drawer icons
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Replaces emoji-prefixed gen docs tag labels with plain OpenAPI tag names.
- Injects drawer icons using the same SVG geometry as existing `packages/ui` icons.
- Applies the same icon treatment to BYOP, CLI, and MCP guide cards/pages.
- Keeps legacy emoji route/upstream tags normalized to the new plain labels.
- Updates APIDOCS generation tag ordering for the new tag names.

Checks:
- `npx biome check --write gen.pollinations.ai/scripts/generate-apidocs.ts gen.pollinations.ai/src/routes/docs.ts gen.pollinations.ai/src/routes/docs-styles.ts gen.pollinations.ai/test/docs.test.ts`
- `npx vitest run test/docs.test.ts` from `gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run typecheck` from `gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run build:production` from `gen.pollinations.ai`

gist.headline: Iconic documentation
gist.blurb: We've swapped out the old emoji prefixes in our API docs for sleek, custom SVG icons. Navigating the guides for BYOP, CLI, and MCP just got a whole lot prettier.
gist.summary: Replaced emoji-prefixed tags in the API documentation with plain OpenAPI tag names and custom SVG icons that match the main UI.
gist.impact: Developers browsing the API docs will see a cleaner, more unified navigation drawer with proper icons for BYOP, CLI, and MCP guides instead of legacy emojis.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a librarian or designer, replacing old emoji stickers with sleek glowing SVG icons on a stack of documentation or a digital menu.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully painting glowing lime green (#ecf874) icons onto a stack of digital documentation books. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays clean, organized folders. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
